data.description: Fitch Ratings: The yen is expected to recover moderately from historical lows.

data.title: Premium Guard Inc. (PGI) named 2025 E-Commerce Vendor of the Year by Advance Auto Parts in Memphis, TN.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on January 12, 2026, Premium Guard Inc. (PGI), a prominent filter manufacturer and supplier, received the prestigious title of 2025 E-Commerce Vendor of the Year from Advance Auto Parts. This recognition was announced at Advance Auto Parts' yearly vendor appreciation event.

data.title: BitMine adds 24,266 ETH, worth $13 billion, but rally may end if shareholder vote fails to increase shares.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies (NYSE: BMNR) recently obtained 24,266 Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), raising their total holdings to 4.17 million ETH valued at $13 billion. However, Chairman Tom Lee cautioned that their acquisition pace may decelerate unless given permission from shareholders to boost authorized shares. BitMine must secure 50.1% shareholder approval to continue purchasing ETH. The company is nearing the limit of its current 500 million authorized shares, which will impede further ETH accumulation once all shares are sold out. A crucial shareholder vote is scheduled for Thursday at the Wynn Las Vegas, necessitating the approval of 50.1% of all outstanding shares for the increase in authorized shares to be granted. Lee highlighted the difficulty in achieving this due to the demanding requirement, emphasizing the urgency in seeking the authorization promptly to avert a halt in their ETH acquisitions.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson reports strong results in colorectal cancer trial with Rybrevant. Positive outcomes support Phase 3 studies. (character count: 121)
data.description: Over the weekend, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) released new extended findings from the Phase 1b/2 OrigAMI-1 trial. The study is investigating Rybrevant (amivantamab-vmjw) combined with FOLFOX or FOLFIRI chemotherapy for RAS/BRAF wild-type metastatic colorectal cancer. The company highlighted promising anti-tumor activity, lasting responses, and minimal treatment-related discontinuations in the trial, indicating the need for more investigation in Phase 3 trials for first- and second-line colorectal cancer treatments. The outcomes were disclosed at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Gastrointestinal Cancers Symposium. The data demonstrated that at a median follow-up of 16 months, amivantamab plus FOLFOX (n=20) or FOLFIRI (n=23) achieved a confirmed overall response rate (ORR)... For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mercury General Corp. (NYSE: MCY) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 17, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Today, Mercury General Corporation (NYSE: MCY) announced that it will release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings report after markets close on February 17, 2026. The Company will issue a press release detailing its financial results for the mentioned period.

data.title: Hippocratic AI strengthens life sciences leadership with Grove AI acquisition, executive appointments, and BCG collaboration.
data.description: Palo Alto, California - Hippocratic AI, a company specializing in GenAI technology, has broadened its presence in the life sciences sector with a significant acquisition. The expansion also includes the appointment of key executives and advisors, as well as the initiation of a strategic collaboration with BCG. This move signifies a strong push towards growth in the industry and solidifies the company's position as a major player.

data.title: Global Off-Highway Vehicle Telematics Market report offers insights from 30 executives of leading companies, covering 48 OEMs.
data.description: Dublin - A report titled "The Global Off-Highway Vehicle Telematics Market - 7th Edition" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report is considered the leading source of information regarding telematics solutions in industries such as construction, mining, agriculture, and forestry. It provides valuable insights for various stakeholders including telematics vendors, vehicle manufacturers, telecom operators, investors, consultants, and government agencies. This comprehensive report offers crucial data and analysis on the global off-highway vehicle telematics market.

data.title: Shipman & Goodwin LLP announces new Management Committee for 2026-2027, Leander Dolphin remains Managing Partner.
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut, on January 12, 2026, Shipman & Goodwin LLP revealed the newly elected Management Committee for the term of 2026–2027 commencing on January 1, 2026. Leander Dolphin retains the position of Managing Partner while introducing new members to the committee.

data.title: Chicago unveils Experience 868's all-inclusive cocktail party "Do Not Disturb," transforming nightlife with a bold event series; 868 unveiled.
data.description: In Chicago, the highly-anticipated all-inclusive cocktail party has arrived with great fanfare. The city is abuzz with the unveiling of Do Not Disturb by Experience 868 this winter. This event series marks a significant shift in Chicago nightlife, offering a luxurious and hotel-inspired experience like never before. Guests can expect glamour, excitement, and exclusivity as they immerse themselves in this unique party setting.

data.title: Pegasus World Cup celebrates 10 years, featuring Empire Of The Sun and Two Friends; tickets on sale for 2026 event.
data.description: In a significant development, the upcoming special edition will showcase a unique performance by Empire Of The Sun: Reimagined (DJ Set) at The Flamingo Room. Adding to the excitement, Two Friends will be headlining the latest Pegasus Fan Zone in the Carousel Club. Tickets for the highly anticipated 2026 Pegasus World Cup are now available for purchase. This event marks the 10-year milestone of being a prominent feature in the entertainment scene.

data.title: Lattice Materials plans a major expansion with an 80,000 sq-ft facility in Montana to meet rising demand for infrared products.
data.description: Recently, an 80,000 square-foot facility was unveiled in Bozeman, Montana as a significant component of the company's expansion plan aimed at keeping up with the increasing demand for essential infrared products. This move not only signifies the company's dedication to growth but also emphasizes the commitment to bolstering a secure domestic supply chain. Lattice Materials (Lattice), a top-tier manufacturer, inaugurated this facility on January 12, 2026, showcasing their strategic approach to meeting market needs effectively.

data.title: American Student Assistance is now Britebound, aiming to help youth with successful careers. - 12 Jan 202638 characters.
data.description: In Boston on January 12, 2026, American Student Assistance® unveiled their rebranding as Britebound™. The nonprofit aims to revolutionize career guidance for youth and assist in their transition to post-high school endeavors. This announcement marks a significant shift for the organization.

data.title: Market volatility: Stocks, bonds and the dollar swing on news threatening Fed Chair Powell, prompting revival of the "sell America" trade.
data.description: A larger movement away from U.S. financial assets could reignite the "sell America" trend from last year, leading to significant changes in investment patterns.

data.title: Andreessen Horowitz secures $15B! Fed chair vs Trump drama! Crypto prices stable; btc at $90,600. Ripple gets FCA approval to expand in UK.
data.description: Major cryptocurrencies remain relatively stable as the market opens on Monday, with Bitcoin steady at $90,600, Ethereum up 1% at $3,110, Solana up 2% at $140, and XRP down 2% at $2.04. Notable movers include IP, up 20%, and XMR, up 15%, reaching an all-time high at $590. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell addressed criminal charges against him, attributing them to not aligning interest rate cuts with Trump's demands. Twitter's X announced plans for "smart cashtags" to display live crypto and stock prices. VanEck predicted Bitcoin could hit $53 million by 2050, driven by long-term adoption and growth assumptions. Andreessen Horowitz raised $15 billion for American Dynamism, focusing on AI and crypto. Ripple obtained FCA approval to expand crypto payments in the UK. BNY Mellon introduced tokenized deposits for institutional and digital-native clients. A new house bill aims to restrict prediction market use among lawmakers and officials. Tether froze $182 million in USDT associated with Venezuelan oil trades.
